---
title: "\'A Toutes les Gloires de la France\'"
---

## \'A Toutes les Gloires de la France\'

**Author:** Elizabeth Wordsworth
**Date:** 1871
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (July 1871) 23-28

### Notes

These verses are signed \'VERITAS\', but can be attributed to Elizabeth Wordsworth on the authority of CMY\'s letter accepting them.  This also suggests that the 16 other poems published in <i>MP</i> under this name between August 1871 and February 1883 are also by Wordsworth.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
